name: Newsletter Signup on About Page
prompt: Can you add a newsletter sign-up section to the bottom of my About page? Just ask for their email address.

checks.judge: A form or section for collecting email addresses for a newsletter or mailing list appears at or near the bottom of the About page

dry_run.text: I've added a newsletter sign-up section to the bottom of your About page with an email address field.

edits.content/pages/about.mdx:
---
title: About Us
description: Learn more about our company
---

<Hero
  heading="About Us"
  subheading="We're passionate about what we do"
/>
<Article
  paragraphs={["We are a dedicated team committed to delivering the best products and services to our customers. Our story began over a decade ago with a simple mission: make quality accessible to everyone."]}
/>
<ContactForm
  heading="Newsletter Sign-Up"
  subheading="Subscribe to receive the latest news and updates"
  fields={[
    { label: "Email Address", type: "email", required: true, placeholder: "your@email.com" }
  ]}
  buttonVariant="primary"
/>
